TestCase z12Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data1, t1.data1, t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data1 = follow_case_data1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check to ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n1 <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Reverse the array data1 in place
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n1 / 2; ++i) {
        double temp = follow_case.data1[i];
        follow_case.data1[i] = follow_case.data1[follow_case.n1 - 1 - i];
        follow_case.data1[follow_case.n1 - 1 - i] = temp;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
